title: fix: add missing API keys to staging secrets
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the staging kingdom
gist.blurb: Polly found some missing keys under the doormat! Staging environments are now fully equipped with the right API credentials for testing.
gist.summary: Added missing API keys for audio and community provider models to the staging environment configuration.
gist.impact: Developers testing on the staging environment will no longer encounter 500 errors when accessing audio and community models.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee finding or holding glowing keys in a cozy server room or garden shed. The keys represent the API keys. A robot companion could be looking relieved.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a glowing golden key in a cozy garden shed filled with retro servers. A chunky monitor-head robot looks relieved, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a glowing golden key in a cozy garden shed filled with retro servers. A chunky monitor-head robot looks relieved, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
